name: TreasuryPilot
notes: Multi-entity crypto tax & compliance dashboard for family offices, trusts, multi-LLC structures. Per-entity tax-lot tracking, quarterly estimated tax calculations, wash sale detection across related entities, consolidated reporting. Highest ARPU ($55-75/mo avg). Moat: multi-entity tax logic no single exchange can replicate. Recommendation: GO. Conservative Year 1 revenue: $80K (200 users), Moderate: $375K (800 users), Aggressive: $1.08M (2000 users). All 9 phases completed: research, validation, build, quality, monetization, app store prep, onboarding, screenshots (6 iPhone 6.7" screens with generation prompts), promo (video script, social posts, press kit, 3 ASO variants). Ready for App Store submission.
